title: AI Solarpunk
description: Reimagines a photo as a bright optimistic ecological future scene.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a bright solarpunk future scene. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, pose, camera angle, framing, outfit color cues, and scene context. Add lush greenery, warm daylight, elegant sustainable architecture, glass and wood details, rooftop gardens or clean transit elements where appropriate, and an optimistic cinematic sci-fi atmosphere. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, dystopian mood, cyberpunk neon dominance, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, duplicate limbs, pollution, rubble, low quality, blurry, cartoon unless requested, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. garden city future, warm sustainable architecture...
